raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "8. Un es zelſchu ſawu Wai-
gu prett to paſchu Wihrn/ un
wiſſchu to par weenu Šihmi un
fakamo Wahrdn/un iſdeldeſchu
to no ſawu Lauschu Widdue/
un juhs fajuttifeet/ ka es tas
KUNGS eſmu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "9. Kad nu weens Prawecte
buhs peewilte/ un jeb ko run-
nahs/ to paſchu Praweetu laidit-
fchu es tas KUNGS atkaſ pre-
wiltu tapt/ un iſiteepſchu ſawu
Rohku prett winzu/ un iſdelde-
fchu to no mannu Iſraëta Lau-
schu Widdue.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "10. Ta neſſihs tee ſawu No-
feegumu/ itt ka ta Waizataja
Noſeegums buhs/ tapatt buhs
ta Praweeta Noſeegums.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "11. Ka tas Iſraëta Nams
pakak mannis wairs ne nomal-
da/ und wairs ne appahnahs ſir
wiſſahm jawahm Pahrkahpſcha-
nahm/ tad buhs tee man par
Laudim/ un es buhſchu teem par
Deewu/ ſakka tas Kungs
KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "12. Atkaſ notieke ta KUN-
GA Wahrdg us man/ kaſ faz-
zija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "13. Tu Zilweka Behrns/ kad
kahda Semnie prett mann ap-
grehkojahs/ un ar Pahrkahp-
ſchanu pahrkahpj/ tad iſſtee-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "ſchu es ſawu Rohku prett win-
nu/ un atnemſchu winnat to
Maises Padohmu/ un fuhtischu
Baddu eekſch tahs/ un iſdelde-
ſchu no turrenes Zilwekus un
Lohpus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "14. Jepſchu tſhee trihs Wihrı
Nous/ Danijels un Jiabs win-
nas Widdii buhtu/ tad tee
(ween) zaur ſawu Taifnihu iſ-
glahbtu ſawas Dwehſeles/ ſak-
ka tas KUNGS KUNGS:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "15. Un ja es ſaunus Sweh-
rus pahr to Semmi weddu/ kaſ
winnaſ Behrnuſ aplaupa/ ta-
ka ta pohſta tohp/ ka nerweens to
Swehrn deht zaur winnu eet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "16. Un ſchee trihs Wihrı win-
nas Widdii buhtu/ tik teefcham
ka es dſihwoju/ ſakka tas Kungs
KUNGS: Tee ne iſglahbtu
nedg Dehlus nedg Mettas/ bet
paſchi ween taptu iſglahbti/ un
ta Semme kkuhtu par pohſtu
Weetu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "17. Jeb kad es to Sohbinu
weddu pahr to paſchu Semmi/
un ſakku: Sohbins/ eij zauri
zaur to Semmi/ un es iſdeldu
no tahs Zilwekus un Lohpus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "18. Jepſchu tee trihs Wihrı
winnas Widdii buhtu/ tik teef-
ſcham ka es dſihwoju/ ſakka tas
KUNGS KUNGS: Tee ne iſ-
glahbtu nedg Dehlus nedg Met-
tas/ bet taptu paſchi ween iſ-
glahbti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "19. Jeb kad es Mehri eeſch
tahs paſchas Semnies fuhtu/
un iſgahſchu pahr winnu ſawu
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
